main.name: Vox Zen
main.occupation: Backend & Systems Engineer — VoIP, CPaaS & AI-assisted Ops
main.description: I build and operate lightweight communication infrastructure, including CPaaS platforms, SIP-based systems, backend APIs, automation tools, and AI-assisted monitoring workflows.
main.bio: I'm Zen, an independent developer behind Vox Zen. I build and operate backend systems, VoIP infrastructure, and CPaaS tools from the ground up, with a focus on SIP, Asterisk, automation, Linux operations, and practical AI-assisted monitoring.
main.contactmessage: Interested in communication systems, automation, or backend infrastructure? Let's connect.

projects.title: CPaaS Mini [Published]
projects.about: A lightweight CPaaS platform built to support voice automation, call handling, and communication workflows. The system integrates cloud communication services with backend APIs, operational tooling, and real-world user usage.

projects.title: Discord AI Assistant Bot [Published]
projects.about: An AI-powered Discord assistant built with OpenAI and ElevenLabs. It supports conversational AI, voice interaction, and automation features for community use.

projects.title: VoIP / SIP Infrastructure Tools
projects.about: A collection of tools and experiments around SIP, Asterisk, call monitoring, AMD detection, and communication system observability.

projects.title: Roblox Game Beta [Published]
projects.about: A Roblox game built using Roblox Studio and Lua scripting, focused on gameplay mechanics and interactive player experience.

projects.title: Discord Game Bot [In Progress]
projects.about: A Discord bot currently in development, focused on game features, player interaction, and community engagement systems.

projects.title: Online Shop Web App [In Progress]
projects.about: An e-commerce web application with Stripe payment integration, product management, checkout flow, and secure payment handling.
